steps.title: Read the roots directly from factored form
steps.content: $(x-5)(x+3)(x-2) = 0$ gives roots $x = 5, -3, 2$. No expansion needed; each factor $(x - r)$ contributes root $r$.

steps.title: Multiply the roots (Vieta shortcut: product = c/a)
steps.content: Product of roots $= 5 \times (-3) \times 2 = -30$. (For a monic cubic $x^3 + \ldots + c$, Vieta confirms product $= -c/1$; reading from the factors is faster.) That confirms D is correct.
